title: eupatorium rugosum var. villicaule
intro: Eupatorium rugosum var. villicaule, also known as the rough joe-pye weed or smooth joe-pye weed, is a perennial plant native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eupatorium rugosum var. villicaule include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as relieving pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
